The '''''Pursuer''-class enforcement ship''' was a heavy [[Patrol ship/Legends|patrol craft]] designed by [[MandalMotors/Legends|MandalMotors]]. During the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] this type of [[Starship/Legends|starship]] was employed in policing [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]]-controlled [[Planet/Legends|worlds]].

==Characteristics==
[[File:Slave2_schem.jpg|thumb|left|180px|''Pursuer''-class ship schematics.]]

The craft was well armed for its size, with twin [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] cannons and a turret-mounted [[Ion cannon/Legends|ion cannon]], giving the ship formidable firepower. Military grade [[Deflector shield/Legends|shield]] generators protected the ''Pursuer'' from harm.

==History==
The ships became popular with [[Spar]] and his [[Mandalorian Protectors (Spar)|Mandalorian Protectors]] during the Clone Wars, before being made available to police forces across [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] when Imperial advisors were placed on the MandalMotors executive board after the rise of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].

[[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] used a modified ''Pursuer'' enforcement ship, which he named ''[[Slave II]],'' after escaping the [[Sarlacc/Legends|sarlacc]] [[Great Pit of Carkoon/Legends|pit]]. It was nearly destroyed when it crashed into a planetary defense shield around [[Byss/Legends|Byss]], but Fett managed to survive and the ship was later stolen from a drydock.

[[File:PES_Enkidu.jpg|thumb|left|180px|The ''[[Enkidu]]''.]]

One of the most infamous Pursuers was the [[Viraxo]]-owned vessel ''[[Enkidu]]'', which harassed the [[Azzameen family]] in several unprovoked raids against [[Twin Suns Transport Services/Legends|Twin Suns Transport Services]] until it was destroyed by the Azzameens, ending the heated feud.<ref name="XWA" />

During the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], the Mandalorian Protectors would use ''Pursuer''-class enforcement ships to great effect to liberate worlds such as [[Gyndine/Legends|Gyndine]].<ref name="THotM" />
